content:
# Beyond RV Admin Chat Knowledge

This file is loaded into the admin AI assistant only. It is never exposed to customers or the public site chatbot. Keep it factual and brief — the admin AI uses it to answer the owner's operational questions without needing to explore the codebase every time.

## Admin pages and tools

- **Admin dashboard**: `/admin` — tabs for Products, Orders, Media, Homepage, Enquiries, Customers, Leads, Drafts, Audit, Knowledge, Google SEO, Matches, Reports, and Pending Changes.
- **Analytics**: `/admin/analytics` — separate page with SEO health, traffic quality, marketing insights, pageview trends, traffic source attribution (YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, Google), and the Campaign Link Builder.
- **Admin chat**: available as a slide-out drawer from the Admin dashboard (Chat tab). Use it to ask operational questions, check SEO, list enquiries, update lead statuses, and queue content changes.

## Campaign Link Builder

- Location: `/admin/analytics` page, scroll to the "Campaign Link Builder" section.
- Purpose: generate tracked URLs for social media, email, or ad campaigns so traffic can be attributed in the analytics.
- How to use:
  1. Select the platform (YouTube, Instagram, Facebook).
  2. Enter a campaign or post name (e.g. "unimog-video").
  3. Enter the target page path (e.g. `/our-slide-on-campers/`).
  4. The tool auto-generates a full URL with `utm_source` and `utm_campaign` parameters (e.g. `https://beyondrv.com.au/our-slide-on-campers/?utm_source=facebook&utm_campaign=unimog-video`).
  5. Click **Copy Link** and paste it into the social post.
- Clicks from these links appear under Facebook/YouTube/Instagram attribution in the Analytics dashboard and PostHog.

## Analytics

- **Traffic Sources**: PostHog tracks UTM parameters (`utm_source`, `utm_medium`, `utm_campaign`) as well as referrer domains.
- **Marketing Insights**: shows conversion funnels and traffic quality by source.
- **SEO Health**: pulls Google Search Console data (clicks, impressions, CTR, position) via a Google Cloud service account. Also checks Bing Webmaster status.
- **Pageview Trends**: site-wide page views over recent days.
- **Enquiry tracking**: enquiry form submissions capture UTM data from the user's session so you know which campaign generated each lead.

## Enquiries and leads

- **List enquiries**: the admin AI can search enquiries by name, email, phone, product, or message text via `list_enquiries`.
- **Update lead status**: use `update_lead_status` to set status (new, contacted, replied, called, qualified, quoted, follow-up-scheduled, won, lost, spam), priority (hot, warm, info-only, spam-low-quality), notes, next follow-up date, and outcome reason.
- Lead status changes are immediate (they don't go to Pending Changes). Only content changes (file edits) go to Pending Changes.
- If more than one enquiry matches a search, the admin AI will list matches and ask which one to update — it won't guess.

## Pending Changes and deployment

- When the admin AI proposes a file change, a safety judge reviews it first before queuing it in the Pending Changes panel.
- The owner must manually review pending changes and click **Deploy** in the Admin dashboard to apply them. Nothing auto-deploys.
- Reversible changes (product data, knowledge files, homepage JSON, enquiry notes) are approved more readily than high-risk changes (layouts, styles, config, Astro components).

## Shopping and checkout

- **Shop products**: managed via the Products tab (set `store: true` in frontmatter, plus price, images, category, stock fields).
- **Product availability**: `available_in_australia`, `coming_next_container`, `made_to_order`, `ask_availability`, `unavailable`.
- **Fulfilment types**: `ship` (online-payable, delivery), `pickup` (online-payable, collect from service centre), `install` (requires ByondRV team — enquiry only), `quote_required` (freight/special-order — enquiry only).
- Only `ship` and `pickup` products with `purchasableOnline: true` and `availability !== 'unavailable'` can be bought through online checkout.
- Ship products must declare packed dimensions and weight (`packedLengthCm`, `packedWidthCm`, `packedHeightCm`, `packedWeightKg`, `shippingDataStatus`).
- `shippingDataStatus` must be `estimated` vs `confirmed`. Australia Post live rates must not be charged on estimated weight.
- Shipping estimates shown in cart are a development preview only — not live rates until AusPost API is wired and weights confirmed.

## Chatbot knowledge

- The public chatbot knowledge file is `src/data/chatbot-knowledge.md`.
- Edit it via the Knowledge tab in Admin, or ask the admin AI to update it.
- Add short, factual, dated notes at the bottom of the file (below the "Owner-editable notes" heading).
- Never add secrets, API keys, passwords, or private customer data to this file (it's loaded into the public AI).
- This admin knowledge file (`admin-chat-knowledge.md`) is separate and never exposed to the public chatbot.

## SEO and AI discovery

- `llms.txt` and `llms-full.txt` are auto-generated at build time for AI crawler discovery. Update product pages (not these files directly) to influence AI search results.
- `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml` are handled by `@astrojs/sitemap`.
- Google Search Console data is pulled via the `seo-data` Netlify function. Bing Webmaster status is checked in the Analytics dashboard.

## URL structure

- Product pages: `/our-slide-on-campers/`, `/our-caravans/`, `/expedition/`, `/on-sale/`, `/custom/`.
- Shop: `/shop/` — individual product pages at `/shop/<slug>/`.
- Enquiry form: `/inquiry-form/`.
- Cart: `/cart/`, Checkout: `/checkout/`.
- Info pages: `/about-us/`, `/warranty/`, `/privacy-policy/`.
- Calculators: `/caravan-towing-calculator/`, `/slide-on-camper-weight-calculator/`, `/vehicle-suitability-checker/`.
- Guides: `/guides/`.
